rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI-matched reference entry with no citation context text (reference index 18), so we cannot tell how the 2002 paper is used in the 2003 paper. While both notes involve dynamic scanner-based models with promotions/advertising, their focal questions differ substantially (forward-looking brand switching vs. umbrella-brand cross-category spillovers), so it is not clearly a mere incidental mention but also not clearly central.
